pi_items.source: Task description, setup scripts, and verifier logic confirm these are the expected synthesized statuses.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the synthetic generation of 5 ADR tiddlers. Verified that the expected ADR statuses exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and verifier logic (ADR-001: Accepted, ADR-002: Accepted, ADR-003: Deprecated, ADR-004: Proposed, ADR-005: Accepted).
